events.name: Ramadan 2026
events.notes: Month-long fasting period. Iftar prep content peaks daily 3–5pm. Sehri window 4–5am.

events.name: Eid-ul-Fitr
events.notes: Largest shopping event of the year. Gift, fashion, and food spend surges 7 days prior.

events.name: Independence Day
events.notes: National pride theme. Green and red color palette resonates strongly.

events.name: Pohela Boishakh
events.notes: Bengali New Year. Traditional dress, food, and gift-giving. Starts at dawn — major street events.

events.name: Eid-ul-Adha
events.notes: Qurbani festival. Meat, grocery, and household spend peaks. 10-day shopping window.

events.name: Durga Puja
events.notes: Major Hindu festival. Fashion and food-focused. Relevant for Dhaka/Chittagong urban segments.

events.name: Victory Day
events.notes: Liberation War commemoration. National pride theme. Red and green branding resonates.

events.name: Christmas
events.notes: Relevant for Christian communities and urban cosmopolitan segments. Gift and food-focused.
